## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and why this change is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check src tests`
- [ ] `uv run basedpyright src`
- [ ] Documentation updated when the public contract changed

## Security

- [ ] No credentials, private workspace information, or sensitive kernel output is included
